name: NUMBERS
summary: Source, singularity, origin of all forms, Duality, reflection, polarity, relationship, Creativity, balance of opposites, stability in motion, Stability, order, grounding, structure, Vitality, humanity, growth, sacred proportion, Balance, harmony, sacred marriage, Sacred mystery, spiritual testing, initiation, Infinity, renewal, balance of two squares, Gestation, fulfillment, completion of cycles, Wholeness, manifestation, cosmic order
flowText: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold. ⚫ 2 — Dyad (Polarity) — Full Correspondences Dyad is the mirror of creation — the dance of opposites, the path of longing and return. 🔺 3 — Triad (Synthesis) — Full Correspondences Triad is the eternal mediator — the triangle of stability, the flame where two become three and creation begins. 🟤 4 — Tetrad (Foundation) — Full Correspondences Tetrad is the earth’s embrace — the square ground where spirit takes root and builds. ⭐ 5 — Pentad (Life / Microcosm) — Full Correspondences Pentad is the star of life — the human form, the spiral of growth, the quintessence within matter. ✡ 6 — Hexad (Harmony / Macrocosm) — Full Correspondences Hexad is the heart’s star — the union of heaven and earth, the seal of harmony. 7 — Heptad (Mystery / Initiation) — Full Correspondences Heptad is the hidden star — the initiator’s gate, the song of sevenfold mystery. 🕗 8 — Ogdoad (Infinity / Threshold) — Full Correspondences Ogdoad is the threshold of infinity — the eternal cycle, the balanced loop of renewal. 🔹 9 — Ennead (Completion / Gestation) — Full Correspondences Ennead is the womb of completion — the ninefold circle, the fullness before rebirth. 🔟 10 — Decad (Cosmos / Tetractys) — Full Correspondences Decad is the whole circle of being — the cosmic return, the universe breathing as One.
